requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Rwanda RSB-adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 + RS/IEC 60335-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（卢旺达RSB采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24 + RS/IEC 60335-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（盧旺達RSB採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24 + RS/IEC 60335-1）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-makers) entering Rwanda must demonstrate electrical safety against the Rwanda-adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read with the general standard RS/IEC 60335-1. These are national adoptions of the IEC 60335 series, so the requirements track the IEC base directly rather than an EN-deviated version. Conformity is demonstrated through the RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and Certificate of Conformity, with safety evidence supplied as test reports — most cleanly an IECEE CB Scheme report on IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1 from a recognised laboratory. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, earthing continuity, flammable-refrigerant provisions (Annex AA), and appliance markings rated for 230 V / 50 Hz. Confirm the exact adopted RS edition with RSB.
summary.zh: 进入卢旺达的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、制冰机）须依据卢旺达采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24标准（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）证明电气安全，并与通用标准RS/IEC 60335-1结合使用。这些为IEC 60335系列的国家采纳，因此要求直接对接IEC基础版本，而非经EN偏差的版本。合格性通过RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）及合格证书证明，安全证据以检测报告提供——最清晰为由认可实验室依据IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB体系报告。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、接地连续性、可燃制冷剂规定（附件AA），及按230 V/50 Hz额定的器具标识。请向RSB确认所采纳RS的具体版本。
summary.zht: 進入盧旺達的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、製冰機）須依據盧旺達採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24標準（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）證明電氣安全，並與通用標準RS/IEC 60335-1結合使用。這些為IEC 60335系列的國家採納，因此要求直接對接IEC基礎版本，而非經EN偏差的版本。合格性通過RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）及合格證書證明，安全證據以檢測報告提供——最清晰為由認可實驗室依據IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB體系報告。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、接地連續性、可燃製冷劑規定（附件AA），及按230 V/50 Hz額定的器具標識。請向RSB確認所採納RS的具體版本。

standards_or_laws: RS/IEC 60335-2-24 (national adoption of IEC 60335-2-24) — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
RS/IEC 60335-1 (national adoption of IEC 60335-1) — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
RSB PVoC / Certificate of Conformity — operative conformity route; safety evidence accepted via IECEE CB Scheme report on the IEC base standard

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before domestic sale. Because both China (GB 4706.13) and Rwanda (RS/IEC 60335-2-24) trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the technical content is close — but a GB-numbered CCC report is not the document RSB issues a CoC against; an IECEE CB Scheme report on the IEC base standard is the cleaner bridge into the Rwanda PVoC route.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中国国家偏差，并与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在国内销售。由于中国（GB 4706.13）和卢旺达（RS/IEC 60335-2-24）均溯源于IEC 60335-2-24，技术内容接近——但GB编号的CCC报告并非RSB据以签发合格证书的文件；基于IEC基础标准的IECEE CB体系报告是进入卢旺达PVoC路径更清晰的桥梁。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中國國家偏差，並與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在國內銷售。由於中國（GB 4706.13）和盧旺達（RS/IEC 60335-2-24）均溯源於IEC 60335-2-24，技術內容接近——但GB編號的CCC報告並非RSB據以簽發合格證書的文件；基於IEC基礎標準的IECEE CB體系報告是進入盧旺達PVoC路徑更清晰的橋樑。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: The technical safety gap is modest because both standards derive from IEC 60335-2-24, but procedural and configuration items remain: (1) Standard reference and route — Rwanda assesses against RS/IEC 60335-2-24 inside the PVoC / CoC; a GB-only CCC report is not the operative document, so the exporter should present an IECEE CB Scheme report on IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1 (with the CB certificate) to the appointed PVoC body. (2) National deviations — GB 4706.13 carries Chinese national deviations (e.g., test conditions, plug/earthing assumptions tied to the 220 V Chinese supply); these must be reviewed against the IEC base and the 230 V / 50 Hz Rwandan supply so that the rating plate, markings, and any voltage-dependent tests reflect 230 V. (3) Markings and instructions — appliance markings must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz and the flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) Annex AA markings must be present. (4) Confirm the exact adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 edition with RSB, since the adopted edition determines which IEC amendments apply.
gap.zh: 由于两标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术安全差距不大，但仍有程序及配置项：（1）标准引用与路径——卢旺达在PVoC/CoC内依据RS/IEC 60335-2-24评定；仅基于GB的CCC报告并非操作文件，故出口商应向指定PVoC机构提交基于IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB体系报告（连同CB证书）。（2）国家偏差——GB 4706.13含中国国家偏差（如试验条件、绑定220 V中国供电的插头/接地假设）；须针对IEC基础及230 V/50 Hz卢旺达供电进行评审，使铭牌、标识及任何电压相关试验反映230 V。（3）标识与说明——器具标识须按230 V/50 Hz额定，并须有可燃制冷剂（R-600a）附件AA标识。（4）请向RSB确认所采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24具体版本，因所采纳版本决定适用哪些IEC修订。
gap.zht: 由於兩標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術安全差距不大，但仍有程序及配置項：（1）標準引用與路徑——盧旺達在PVoC/CoC內依據RS/IEC 60335-2-24評定；僅基於GB的CCC報告並非操作文件，故出口商應向指定PVoC機構提交基於IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB體系報告（連同CB證書）。（2）國家偏差——GB 4706.13含中國國家偏差（如試驗條件、綁定220 V中國供電的插頭/接地假設）；須針對IEC基礎及230 V/50 Hz盧旺達供電進行評審，使銘牌、標識及任何電壓相關試驗反映230 V。（3）標識與說明——器具標識須按230 V/50 Hz額定，並須有可燃製冷劑（R-600a）附件AA標識。（4）請向RSB確認所採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24具體版本，因所採納版本決定適用哪些IEC修訂。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to RS/IEC 60335-2-24 (with RS/IEC 60335-1) is required, demonstrated within the RSB PVoC / Certificate of Conformity before import; IECEE CB Scheme report on the IEC base standard is the cleanest accepted evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for Rwanda runs through the RSB-adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 (with RS/IEC 60335-1), demonstrated inside the PVoC / Certificate of Conformity. Because Rwanda adopts the IEC base standard directly and Chinese GB 4706.13 derives from the same IEC, technical alignment is good — but the exporter should present an IECEE CB Scheme report on IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1 rather than a GB-only CCC report, review GB national deviations against the IEC base and the 230 V / 50 Hz supply, and update rating-plate/markings to 230 V. verified:false — confirm the exact adopted RS edition with RSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达的电气安全通过RSB采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24（配合RS/IEC 60335-1）实施，并在PVoC/合格证书内证明。由于卢旺达直接采纳IEC基础标准，且中国GB 4706.13源自同一IEC，技术对齐良好——但出口商应提交基于IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB体系报告，而非仅基于GB的CCC报告，针对IEC基础及230 V/50 Hz供电评审GB国家偏差，并将铭牌/标识更新为230 V。verified:false——请向RSB确认所采纳RS的具体版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達的電氣安全通過RSB採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24（配合RS/IEC 60335-1）實施，並在PVoC/合格證書內證明。由於盧旺達直接採納IEC基礎標準，且中國GB 4706.13源自同一IEC，技術對齊良好——但出口商應提交基於IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB體系報告，而非僅基於GB的CCC報告，針對IEC基礎及230 V/50 Hz供電評審GB國家偏差，並將銘牌/標識更新為230 V。verified:false——請向RSB確認所採納RS的具體版本。
